description: Configure KML Regionation optimization for the 'ne_populated_places' layer in the 'ne' workspace to allow large datasets to be efficiently streamed to Google Earth. Log in to the GeoServer web admin interface at http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/ (Username: admin, Password: Admin123!) and configure the 'ne:ne_populated_places' layer to use the 'external-sorting' Regionation Strategy with 'pop_max' as the Regionation Attribute.
